name: revenant-light
description: American-Dynamism / field-spec register. Concrete Gray surface, System Black ink, Signal Orange accent (Pantone 1655C). Operational, high-stakes — for ops/dashboard surfaces and the Revenant trading lifecycle, not general retail.
brand_rule: --brand = strongest neutral inverse of the surface (onyx); --accent = signal orange, reserved for ONE hero action/metric per view. Orange is never the brand fill.

contrast_notes.accent_on_bg: 2.1:1 — fails AA for text; use accent_deep (7.4:1 AAA) for orange text
contrast_notes.accent_fg_on_accent: 5.2:1 (AA normal) — onyx text on orange fill

type.register_note: Dual-register is a layout decision, not a theme token: mono (Aeonik Mono) for data/IDs/timestamps/status chrome/micro-labels (10px min); sans (Aeonik) for prose/nav/buttons; serif (Lock Serif) reserved for an editorial hero headline if a surface has one.

motion.note: Sharp, no overshoot — precision-instrument feel, snappier than Lore.

shadow_note: Flat offset (no Gaussian blur) — construction-drawing energy.
